failure.error_message: depth-stress training and tuning require all states

diagnosis.finding: The training partition contained all three frozen states. Only the untouched tuning month lacked the stressed state.
diagnosis.contract_analysis: The frozen design requires a complete immediately preceding tuning month but does not require every state in that month. Multiclass log-loss remains defined when a validation partition omits a class represented in training.

correction.scope: Remove only the undocumented all-state requirement from the tuning partition while retaining it for training.
